title: Vežba 38

questions.text: Koji izbor koristi tačno negativnu formu vremena za Present Perfect Continuous?

answers.answer: The app hasn't been functioning well lately.
The app is not functioning well lately.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica koristi u kontekstu Present Continuous, a ne u kontekstu Present Perfect continuous.

answers.answer: The app didn't function well lately.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica koristi vreme Simple Past, a ne Present Perfect Continuous.

answers.answer: The app doesn't function well lately.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica je za Present Simple, nije za Present Perfect continuous.

instructions: Ovo vežbanje nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje koje se nalazi dole i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation: Negativna forma vremena za Present Perfect continuous formira se pomoću hasn't/haven't + been + present participle. Opisuje radnju koja je počela u prošlosti i koja se nastavlja ili je važna, ali nije dogodila se kako je očekivano.
